title: specbase dual-track data shapes

ToolDefinition.description: Single source-of-truth tool definition exported by @specbase/lib (DD-5); both adapters consume it.

SpecbaseToolCtx.description: Context both adapters supply to a handler; replaces MCP env injection for the native path (DD-8).

fields.repo: string (target repo owning the .specbase store; parity with SPECBASE_TARGET_REPO this round)

NativeToolId.description: opencode ToolRegistry id, preserved from the MCP path (DD-6).

EventStore.description: Unchanged on-disk store; written in-process instead of via stdio.
EventStore.access: append-only event log + FTS index (existing @specbase/lib behavior)

fields.path: opencode submodule path (e.g. vendor/specbase or external/specbase)
fields.pinned_commit: string (specbase commit sha; bumped manually to update)

invariants: MCP adapter and native layer never implement logic — both only project ToolDefinition over their transport (DD-2/DD-5).
native NativeToolId set ⊇ the specbase_* ids agents rely on (parity, DD-6).
no opencode-spawned specbase child process exists once native path is active.
